title: OO EE A E A Fabric
description: This mod is a Fabric remake of OO EE A E A.
body:
This mod is a Fabric remake of [OO EE A E A](https://modrinth.com/mod/oo-ee-a-e-a).

Unlike the original mod, cats will spin and levitate after a certain time - just like the OO-EE-A-E-A cat - even when players aren't nearby.

All features can be adjusted in the configuration menu.

![OO EE A E A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2bd889c1dcab0cd4a9604b036378165031b1a93.gif)
